hotels.name: Hostel One Ramblas
hotels.snippet: hostel · $15-$25 per night — A vibrant hostel in Barcelona offering dormitory beds with free walking tours and social events, ideal for budget travelers.

hotels.name: TOC Hostel Barcelona
hotels.snippet: hostel · $20-$35 per night — Modern hostel in Barcelona with both private and shared rooms, centrally located and close to public transport.

hotels.name: Hotel ibis Barcelona Centro
hotels.snippet: hotel · $40-$60 per night — Budget hotel offering clean rooms with basic amenities in central Barcelona, close to major attractions.

hotels.name: Hostal Gala
hotels.snippet: guesthouse · $40-$55 per night — Affordable guesthouse in Madrid with private rooms, friendly atmosphere, and walking distance to public transport.

hotels.name: The Urban Hostel
hotels.snippet: hostel · $30-$50 per night — Comfortable hostel in Madrid with dorms and private rooms, close to city center and museums.

hotels.name: Hotel Aneto
hotels.snippet: hotel · $50-$70 per night — Simple budget hotel located in Granada, near the Granada Cathedral and Alhambra.

hotels.name: Hostal La Campana
hotels.snippet: guesthouse · $60-$80 per night — Cozy guesthouse in Seville, offering comfortable private rooms with traditional Andalusian decoration.

hotels.name: Ibis Budget Madrid Centro Lavapies
hotels.snippet: hotel · $65-$85 per night — Budget hotel with modern rooms in the center of Madrid, well connected to public transport and attractions.

state.input: Give me 7 day itinerary to Spain under 1500 EUR
itinerary: Explore the city center on foot with budget-friendly morning sightseeing.
Visit local markets and try inexpensive street food for lunch.
Enjoy a free or low-cost cultural site or museum in the afternoon.
Relax in a public park and have a light picnic for dinner.

places.name: Sagrada Família
places.snippet: A large, unfinished Roman Catholic basilica in Barcelona designed by architect Antoni Gaudí, known for its unique architecture.

places.name: Alhambra
places.snippet: A stunning palace and fortress complex located in Granada, showcasing beautiful Moorish architecture and gardens.

places.name: Park Güell
places.snippet: A public park in Barcelona featuring colorful mosaics and architectural elements by Antoni Gaudí.

places.name: The Prado Museum
places.snippet: Located in Madrid, it is one of the world's premier art museums, housing a vast collection of European art.

places.name: La Rambla
places.snippet: A famous street in central Barcelona bustling with shops, cafes, street performers, and markets.

places.name: Seville Cathedral and Giralda
places.snippet: A Gothic cathedral in Seville, the largest in the world, with an iconic bell tower called the Giralda.

places.name: Plaza Mayor, Madrid
places.snippet: A historic square in Madrid surrounded by beautiful architecture and filled with cafes and events.

places.name: Costa del Sol Beaches
places.snippet: Famous Mediterranean beaches along southern Spain noted for sunbathing, water sports, and nightlife.

places.name: Camino de Santiago
places.snippet: A renowned pilgrimage route across northern Spain ending at the Cathedral of Santiago de Compostela.

places.name: Ibiza
places.snippet: An island in the Balearics famous for vibrant nightlife, beautiful beaches, and electronic music scene.

state.input: Give me 7 day itinerary to Spain under 1500 EUR
itinerary: Explore the city center on foot with budget-friendly morning sightseeing.
Visit local markets and try inexpensive street food for lunch.
Enjoy a free or low-cost cultural site or museum in the afternoon.
Relax in a public park and have a light picnic for dinner.

restaurants.name: Casa Mono
restaurants.snippet: $$ — A trendy spot in Madrid known for its creative tapas and excellent wine selection.

restaurants.name: El Xampanyet
restaurants.snippet: $ — Famous for its cava and traditional Catalan tapas, located in Barcelona's El Born district.

restaurants.name: Bar La Tasca
restaurants.snippet: $ — A classic budget-friendly tapas bar serving authentic Andalusian dishes in Seville.

restaurants.name: Mesón Cinco Jotas
restaurants.snippet: $$$ — Renowned for its high-quality Iberian ham and traditional Spanish cuisine in Madrid.

restaurants.name: Bodegón Aurrerá
restaurants.snippet: $$ — Offers traditional Basque dishes with locally sourced ingredients in San Sebastián.

restaurants.name: La Casa del Abuelo
restaurants.snippet: $ — Popular for its garlic prawns and affordable tapas in Madrid.

restaurants.name: Cervecería Catalana
restaurants.snippet: $$ — A lively Barcelona eatery well-loved for its extensive tapas menu and local vibe.

restaurants.name: Taberna El Sur
restaurants.snippet: $ — Cozy tapas bar in Granada offering traditional dishes with friendly service at great prices.

restaurants.name: La Pepica
restaurants.snippet: $$ — A beachfront Valencia restaurant famous for its authentic paella and seafood.

restaurants.name: Cafe Central
restaurants.snippet: $ — A popular café in Granada known for its live jazz and delicious local snacks.

state.input: Give me 7 day itinerary to Spain under 1500 EUR
itinerary: Day 1: See Sagrada Família, Park Güell — Eat at El Xampanyet, Cervecería Catalana — Stay: TOC Hostel Barcelona
Day 2: See La Rambla, Plaza Mayor, Madrid — Eat at Casa Mono, Bar La Tasca — Stay: The Urban Hostel
Day 3: See The Prado Museum, Seville Cathedral and Giralda — Eat at Taberna El Sur, Mesón Cinco Jotas — Stay: Hostal Gala
Day 4: See Alhambra, Costa del Sol Beaches — Eat at La Casa del Abuelo, La Pepica — Stay: Hotel Aneto
Day 5: See Camino de Santiago, Ibiza — Eat at Cafe Central, Bodegón Aurrerá — Stay: Hostel One Ramblas

state.finalResponse:
# Spain Travel Plan

**Budget:** €1500
> **Current weather:** 20°C · wind 3.2 km/h

## Day-by-Day Itinerary

### Day 1
**See:**

Day 2: See La Rambla, Plaza Mayor, Madrid — Eat at Casa Mono, Bar La Tasca — Stay: The Urban Hostel
Day 3: See The Prado Museum, Seville Cathedral and Giralda — Eat at Taberna El Sur, Mesón Cinco Jotas — Stay: Hostal Gala

places.name: Sagrada Família
places.snippet: A large, unfinished Roman Catholic basilica in Barcelona designed by architect Antoni Gaudí, known for its unique architecture.

places.name: Alhambra
places.snippet: A stunning palace and fortress complex located in Granada, showcasing beautiful Moorish architecture and gardens.

places.name: Park Güell
places.snippet: A public park in Barcelona featuring colorful mosaics and architectural elements by Antoni Gaudí.

places.name: The Prado Museum
places.snippet: Located in Madrid, it is one of the world's premier art museums, housing a vast collection of European art.

places.name: La Rambla
places.snippet: A famous street in central Barcelona bustling with shops, cafes, street performers, and markets.

places.name: Seville Cathedral and Giralda
places.snippet: A Gothic cathedral in Seville, the largest in the world, with an iconic bell tower called the Giralda.

places.name: Plaza Mayor, Madrid
places.snippet: A historic square in Madrid surrounded by beautiful architecture and filled with cafes and events.

places.name: Costa del Sol Beaches
places.snippet: Famous Mediterranean beaches along southern Spain noted for sunbathing, water sports, and nightlife.

places.name: Camino de Santiago
places.snippet: A renowned pilgrimage route across northern Spain ending at the Cathedral of Santiago de Compostela.

places.name: Ibiza
places.snippet: An island in the Balearics famous for vibrant nightlife, beautiful beaches, and electronic music scene.

hotels.name: Hostel One Ramblas
hotels.snippet: hostel · $15-$25 per night — A vibrant hostel in Barcelona offering dormitory beds with free walking tours and social events, ideal for budget travelers.

hotels.name: TOC Hostel Barcelona
hotels.snippet: hostel · $20-$35 per night — Modern hostel in Barcelona with both private and shared rooms, centrally located and close to public transport.

hotels.name: Hotel ibis Barcelona Centro
hotels.snippet: hotel · $40-$60 per night — Budget hotel offering clean rooms with basic amenities in central Barcelona, close to major attractions.

hotels.name: Hostal Gala
hotels.snippet: guesthouse · $40-$55 per night — Affordable guesthouse in Madrid with private rooms, friendly atmosphere, and walking distance to public transport.

hotels.name: The Urban Hostel
hotels.snippet: hostel · $30-$50 per night — Comfortable hostel in Madrid with dorms and private rooms, close to city center and museums.

hotels.name: Hotel Aneto
hotels.snippet: hotel · $50-$70 per night — Simple budget hotel located in Granada, near the Granada Cathedral and Alhambra.

hotels.name: Hostal La Campana
hotels.snippet: guesthouse · $60-$80 per night — Cozy guesthouse in Seville, offering comfortable private rooms with traditional Andalusian decoration.

hotels.name: Ibis Budget Madrid Centro Lavapies
hotels.snippet: hotel · $65-$85 per night — Budget hotel with modern rooms in the center of Madrid, well connected to public transport and attractions.

restaurants.name: Casa Mono
restaurants.snippet: $$ — A trendy spot in Madrid known for its creative tapas and excellent wine selection.

restaurants.name: El Xampanyet
restaurants.snippet: $ — Famous for its cava and traditional Catalan tapas, located in Barcelona's El Born district.

restaurants.name: Bar La Tasca
restaurants.snippet: $ — A classic budget-friendly tapas bar serving authentic Andalusian dishes in Seville.

restaurants.name: Mesón Cinco Jotas
restaurants.snippet: $$$ — Renowned for its high-quality Iberian ham and traditional Spanish cuisine in Madrid.

restaurants.name: Bodegón Aurrerá
restaurants.snippet: $$ — Offers traditional Basque dishes with locally sourced ingredients in San Sebastián.

restaurants.name: La Casa del Abuelo
restaurants.snippet: $ — Popular for its garlic prawns and affordable tapas in Madrid.

restaurants.name: Cervecería Catalana
restaurants.snippet: $$ — A lively Barcelona eatery well-loved for its extensive tapas menu and local vibe.

restaurants.name: Taberna El Sur
restaurants.snippet: $ — Cozy tapas bar in Granada offering traditional dishes with friendly service at great prices.

restaurants.name: La Pepica
restaurants.snippet: $$ — A beachfront Valencia restaurant famous for its authentic paella and seafood.

restaurants.name: Cafe Central
restaurants.snippet: $ — A popular café in Granada known for its live jazz and delicious local snacks.

costBreakdown.notes: Costs reflect budget guesthouses or hostels, meals at local restaurants, public transportation in cities like Madrid or Barcelona, and entry fees for major budget-friendly attractions.
